mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.number AS "number", a.version AS "version", a.url AS "url", a.qr_code AS "qrCode", a.content AS "content", a.type AS "type", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_upgrade( number, version, url, qr_code, content, type, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{number}, #{version}, #{url}, #{qrCode}, #{content}, #{type}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_upgrade
number = #{number},
version = #{version},
url = #{url},
qr_code = #{qrCode},
content = #{content},
type = #{type},
update_date = #{updateDate},
WHERE id = #{id}
